original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Victoria, Oliver, Benjamin, and William. Victoria stated, "Oliver is a knight". Oliver told you that William is a knight or Victoria is a knight. According to Benjamin, "William is a knave". William said that Benjamin is a knave if and only if Victoria is a knave. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
